---
id: build-log
title: "Get the build log of a build"
description: "Get the build log of a specified build of a Bitrise app. You can get the build slug either by calling the [/builds](https://api-docs.bitrise.io/#/builds/build-list) endpoint or by clicking on the build on bitrise.io and copying the slug from the URL. Preview of the log is returned in `log_chunks` field in JSON format. You can download the full raw log in txt by using the signed url returned in `expiring_raw_log_url`. Be aware that this url is expiring in 10 minutes!"
sidebar_label: "Get the build log of a build"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"
info_path: en/bitrise-api/api-reference/bitrise-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";
import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";
import NT from '@site/src/components/NT';

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Get the build log of a build"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/apps/{app-slug}/builds/{build-slug}/log"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Get the build log of a specified build of a <NT>Bitrise</NT> app. You can get the build slug either by calling the [/builds](https://api-docs.bitrise.io/#/builds/build-list) endpoint or by clicking on the build on bitrise.io and copying the slug from the URL. Preview of the log is returned in `log_chunks` field in JSON format. You can download the full raw log in txt by using the signed url returned in `expiring_raw_log_url`. Be aware that this url is expiring in 10 minutes!

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>
  <Translate id="theme.openapi.request.title">Request</Translate>
</Heading>
